selections.name: Ongatiti (NZ)
selections.reason: Third-up and won third-up previously. Fitter now and making headway every start. Handles the wet.

selections.name: Shamarkand (FR)
selections.reason: Making debut in a jumps race but has the flat class to figure prominently here.

selections.name: Sirius Black (FR)
selections.reason: Useful gelding making headway. Solid second at Kyneton last start.

selections.name: West Indies (NZ)
selections.reason: Fought on last time out. Big chance again in this field.

danger_horse.name: Mana Combat (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Racing second-up today. Finished second at Mornington recently.

selections.name: Andy Win (NZ)
selections.reason: Third-up today. Strong second at Terang on rain-affected going last start. Big chance.

selections.name: The Vocalist (NZ)
selections.reason: Second-up today. Made headway from midfield last start. Top chance with upside.

selections.name: Jabbawockeez (NZ)
selections.reason: Forgive first-up failure. Rates well here and is worth another chance.

selections.name: Sunday Buzz (NZ)
selections.reason: Third-up today. Progressing well this campaign and gets to the right race now.

danger_horse.name: Mr Waterville (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Making debut in a jumps race. Quality flat performer who must be respected.

selections.name: Ardakan (GB)
selections.reason: Quality flat performer transitioning to jumps. Excellent second at Terang on rain-affected going.

selections.name: Untethered (NZ)
selections.reason: Will be hard to beat with that last run under the belt. Strong form.

selections.name: The Claimant
selections.reason: Third-up today. Solid second at Stawell last start. Looks tested but capable.

selections.name: Malborough Bay (NZ)
selections.reason: Second-up today. Rates well on best form and can sneak into the finish.

danger_horse.name: Jungle Jet (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Third-up today. Can improve off recent efforts with the right run.

selections.name: Queen Christine
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed promise last prep and trialed well. Could prove too smart for these.

selections.name: Positive Image
selections.reason: Nice effort last time when second at Stawell. Can go on with the job now.

selections.name: Makarim
selections.reason: Third-up today. Fitter now and making headway. Will take beating.

selections.name: Upolu
selections.reason: Second-up. Among the leading chances based on recent form.

danger_horse.name: Le Notre
danger_horse.reason: Recent form sound. Genuine chance on the back of the last effort.

selections.name: Angelic Rise
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed ability in stakes company last prep. Definite winning hope.

selections.name: Divine Dot
selections.reason: Resuming. Won on debut and looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Bold showing expected.

selections.name: Ivy
selections.reason: Resuming. Trialed well recently. Could prove too smart for these if right.

selections.name: Unkechaug
selections.reason: First starter by Blue Point. Trialed well leading into this debut.

danger_horse.name: Victimised
danger_horse.reason: First starter by Shalaa. Trialed well and prefers to be kept safe.

selections.name: Stern Idol (IRE)
selections.reason: Dominant winner last start by 25 lengths on heavy track. Class runner of the field.

selections.name: Hit The Road Jack (NZ)
selections.reason: Won by 15 lengths last start in the wet. Fitter now and making headway. Rates strongly.

selections.name: The Mighty Spar (NZ)
selections.reason: Finished second to Stern Idol last start. Big chance to feature again.

selections.name: Instigator (GER)
selections.reason: Won last start at Terang. Has the ability to be in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Leaderboard (USA)
danger_horse.reason: Third-up today. Top chance if he can find his best form.

selections.name: Ardashir (FR)
selections.reason: Won last start at Pakenham. Tricky assignment from the wide gate but has class.

selections.name: Customer Service (NZ)
selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Won last start at Bendigo. Big chance to go back-to-back.

selections.name: El James (NZ)
selections.reason: Further improvement is anticipated after a solid run at Morphettville Parks.

selections.name: My Uncle Did It (NZ)
selections.reason: Racing well recently. Sure to be right there at the business end.

danger_horse.name: Whisky Moon
danger_horse.reason: Won last start at Kyneton. Hard to have on recent efforts but capable.

selections.name: Hedonist
selections.reason: Back from a spell. Quality runner who can feature fresh.

selections.name: I'mateez
selections.reason: Second-up. Won last start at Geelong in soft going. Improver with winning prospects.

selections.name: Arlington Row
selections.reason: Nicely placed to atone after a poor run last start. Capable of bouncing back.

selections.name: The Grumpy Bear
selections.reason: Second-up. Won first-up at Cranbourne. Solid top-three hope.

danger_horse.name: Dobkins
danger_horse.reason: Watch for sharp improvement after a solid run at Geelong.

selections.name: Bold Soul (NZ)
selections.reason: Class runner returning. Has the quality to win this fresh.

selections.name: Lincoln Rocks (NZ)
selections.reason: Resuming. Strong form last prep. One of the better chances.

selections.name: Until Valhalla
selections.reason: Narrowly missed last start and is a top chance again.

selections.name: Precious Charm
selections.reason: Returns from a let-up. Can bounce back in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Van Roy
danger_horse.reason: Racing well and can win again after a strong victory at Penola.

selections.name: High Tempo (NZ)
selections.reason: Racing well recently. Nicely placed to score after a narrow defeat last start.

selections.name: Amleto (IRE)
selections.reason: Resuming. Quality import who can figure fresh.

selections.name: Rasp
selections.reason: Scored a big win at Pakenham last start on a heavy track. Can salute again.

selections.name: Beach Pad
selections.reason: Back from a spell. May need the run but has class.

danger_horse.name: Captain Electric (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Previous preparation first-up to post a big win. Respect.
